text.title: WebSocket Design Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Multiplayer chat WS v1
example.note: envelope fields v/type/id/ts/payload; heartbeat 30s/90s; reconnect base 1s max 60s full jitter; send_queue 1000 drop_oldest; auth signed_token_query ttl=300s; message_schemas chat.message/typing/presence. Server restart - 100k clients reconnect smoothly over 60s; NAT timeouts caught by heartbeat in <90s; one slow client gets shedded after 1000 backlog and reconnects with fresh state.

example.title: Freeform-payload reconnect-storm rebuild
example.note: Original: payload was raw JSON; reconnect every 100ms; cookie auth only; unbounded send queue. Server crashed on every outage. Tree caught all rules; rewrite took 1 sprint.
